monster.name: KreigHighlander
monster.description: A tall and imposing man, military bearing even when seated. Short-cropped gray hair, groomed beard, a thin scar crossing his left temple. He always wears polished plate armor — even when it's not needed. Dark blue cloak with the Highlander crest: a falcon on a mountain background. He speaks with a booming voice, accustomed to giving orders and being obeyed. He looks down on his interlocutors — literally and figuratively. He has a habit of drumming his fingers on his sword hilt when bored. Distinctive trait: arrogant and overconfident to a fault. He systematically underestimates his opponents — a flaw that could cost him dearly. Role: leader of the Castro (center of Orcastle); Count Wildforge in Module D
